summary: New service catalog submissions nearly doubled from FY22 to FY23 (29,646 to 57,077), which OTI attributed to a 93 percent jump in agency requests for items like desk phones, mobile devices, multi-factor authentication and software licenses as the newly consolidated agency took on more IT support work. The FY26 figure in this dataset is a partial-year, year-to-date total rather than a full fiscal year, which is why it looks lower than FY25.

sources.label: OTI, Preliminary Fiscal 2026 Mayor's Management Report

oneLiner: increasing overall; the FY26 figure shown is partial-year only
